# eutech.directory

> The definitive directory of EU-built software — GDPR by default, no US cloud dependencies.

## What is eutech.directory?

eutech.directory is a curated directory of 746 verified EU-built software tools.
All tools are GDPR compliant, hosted within the European Union, and do not depend on US cloud infrastructure.

## Categories

- AI & Automation: 26 tools
- Analytics & Data: 98 tools
- Cloud & Hosting: 64 tools
- Developer Tools: 18 tools
- Email & Communication: 95 tools
- Finance & Payments: 9 tools
- HR & Team: 10 tools
- Marketing & SEO: 7 tools
- Other: 343 tools
- Project Management: 34 tools
- Security & Privacy: 25 tools
- Storage & Backup: 17 tools

- [Aruba Domains](/tools/aruba-domains/)
- [Combell Domains](/tools/combell-domains/)
- [DeepL](/tools/deepl/)
- [Domainnameshop](/tools/domainnameshop/)
- [eTranslation](/tools/etranslation/)

- [Gandi](/tools/gandi/)
- [Hostinger Domain](/tools/hostinger-domain/)
- [Hostpoint Domains](/tools/hostpoint-domains/)

- [INWX](/tools/inwx/)
- [IONOS domains](/tools/ionos-domains/)
- [Joker.com](/tools/joker-com/)
- [ModernMT](/tools/modernmt/)
- [netim](/tools/netim/)
- [NordName](/tools/nordname/)
- [Openprovider](/tools/openprovider/)
- [OVHcloud Domains](/tools/ovhcloud-domains/)

- [EU alternative to Google Cloud](/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-google-cloud/)

- [EU alternative to Datadog](/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-datadog/)
- [EU alternative to Figma](/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-figma/)
- [EU alternative to Jira](/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-jira/)
- [EU alternative to Asana](/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-asana/)

## How to use this directory

- Search all tools: https://eutech-directory.github.io/
- Browse by category: https://eutech-directory.github.io/category/[category]/
- Find EU alternatives: https://eutech-directory.github.io/alternatives/eu-alternative-to-[tool]/
- Individual tool pages: https://eutech-directory.github.io/tools/[tool-name]/

## Submit a tool

Know an EU-built tool we're missing? Submit via the form at https://eutech-directory.github.io/#submit

## Featured listings

EU software companies can get featured placement in their category.
Contact: eutech.directory featured listings.

## Data

- Total verified EU tools: 746
- Categories: 12
- Last updated: 2026-04-19
